basics.name: Vijay Hothi
basics.summary: Research Scholar in Electronics and Communication Engineering at Gujarat Technological University, Ahmedabad, India. Specializing in speaker diarization, deep learning for speech processing, and edge AI.

work.summary: Conducting research on speaker diarization, robust speaker embeddings, and edge AI for speech processing.

education.area: Ph.D. in Electronics and Communication Engineering
M.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering

publications.name: Enhanced Speaker Embeddings With Adaptive Feature Aggregation For Robust Speaker Diarization
publications.publisher: International Journal of Advances in Signal and Image Sciences (IJASIS)
publications.summary: Proposes AFA-TDNN for discriminative speaker embeddings with Batch-Adaptive Data Augmentation (BADA), achieving DER 2.23% on AMI Meeting Corpus.

publications.name: Adaptive Multi-Scale Speaker Diarization on DISPLACE 2024 Challenge Task
publications.publisher: PReMI 2025, Lecture Notes in Computer Science, Springer
publications.summary: Adaptive multi-scale diarization system for the DISPLACE 2024 Challenge targeting far-field multilingual conversational speech.

presentations.name: Adaptive Multi-Scale Speaker Diarization on DISPLACE 2024 Challenge Task
presentations.event: 11th International Conference on Pattern Recognition and Machine Intelligence (PReMI 2025)
